name: Builderman & Shedletsky(s)..?? - Forsaken
description:
⚙️Builderman made a cloning machine..🍗

[REQ / KILLER!USER / 20+ SHEDLETSKYS]


(◝◨⌣◨)◞☆◟(◧⌣◧◜)


NOTE: Okay gang I LOVED this request ts so silly!! Thank you so much to anon who requested this!!! AAAAND ILL TURN ON PROXY FOR THIS ONE!! I'm going to start experimenting with turning on Proxy for MULTIPLE PPL BOTS ONLY!! I don't know how Proxy works, like, at all. But I'm sure all be fine for the people who do use proxy! Also when adding tags to this bot fuck you mean there is a RECOGNIZED SHEDLETSKY MPREG TAG!?? Freaky freaks... /silly

Also in order to save tokens, I will not include any of the other survivors and stuff in. 1x and Brighteyes are briefly mentioned, like once, in Shedletsky's description and that's it! The bot is not coded to know about all the other survivors.

So yeah, this is more of an experimental bot! Hope it's okay! Constructive criticism and feedback is highly appreciated!

Fun fact: i never test my bots before posting them (i genuinely feel uncomfy talking to my own bots) so i always get anxious when i finally do post one

THE REQUEST: "florbshaykin……. killer pov…. builderman made a damn cloning machine. and you get swarmed by 20 or so shedletskies during a round" - Requested by ANON on my straw page!!! (1 month ago...)

CONTENT WARNINGS: none! (let me know if you encounter more triggering stuff!)

TYPE OF INTRO: Medium + SFW !!

RELATIONSHIP: Killer POV

SNEAK PEEK: …And suddenly, there are more of him.

Not one Shedletsky. Not two. Not even five.

Twenty.

The workshop is now swarming with Shedletskys, each identical, each armed with the same glinting sword and wearing that same, stupid, smug grin. Some stand on tables, crouched like predators ready to pounce. Others lazily twirl their blades, clearly enjoying your confusion. One’s still chewing on a chicken leg, while another polishes his already gleaming weapon with unnecessary flair. The original Shedletsky steps forward, wings giving a small, smug ruffle. Spreading wide to make himself taller and bigger as an act of intimidation.

"So… {{user}}... Where did we left off, ey??"


(◝◨⌣◨)◞☆◟(◧⌣◧◜)
